data.name: The Seven Realms - Realm 1: Terran
data.detailed_description:
You have tried to maintain a semblance of peace throughout the Realm for four hundred years.

Since the death of the Queen and a great apathy seized the King, it fell to you, the prince of the vampires, to restore the order. So when you smell an unfamiliar scent that should not have been amongst a party of humans, you go to investigate and meet Leyala.

Leyala seems to be hiding something, and by trying to undercover what, you start a chain of events that will cause you to venture across The Seven Realms.

The Seven Realms is a fantasy, story-driven, adult visual novel. As the heir of one of the most powerful Realms, your choices will determine the fate of the world. Will you be a strong or a fair ruler? Will you inspire fear in your subordinates or let them think of you as weak? Are you going to forgive or hold your grudges forever? The choices are yours.

Take the time to know the 3 main Love Interests, 4 Harem Members, and 1 Bonus Encounter present in Realm 1. Will you be a one-woman-only kind of man, or will you start building your harem?

The Seven Realms has expanded lore and in-depth character backgrounds.

If you like the game and are interested in knowing more about the Realms and the characters, you can read short stories and detailed species descriptions, as well as watch videos about it on our website and social media.

In the subsequent chapters, you will travel through the Realms and meet up to 23 women. Each one of them have different personalities, backstories and appearances.

data.short_description: The Seven Realms is a fantasy, story-driven, adult visual novel where your choices will shape the fate of the Realms and the people around you. Will you be a Fair or a Strong Ruler? Will fate be enough for you, or will you want more? The choices are yours to make.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 法文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and above
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0-capable graphics card/integrated GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard
  • 備註: None

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0-capable graphics card/integrated GPU
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard
  • 備註: None

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0-capable graphics card/integrated GPU
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard
  • 備註: None
